revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿一]][[zh:二月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 21|qq=February 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tian'an|ja|天安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian'an|1=Cheonan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3577288}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|857|en|857|qid=Q30374|lt=857|1=857}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Saikō|en|Saikō|qid=Q1324664|lt=Saikō|1=Saikō}} to {{ill|Tian'an|ja|天安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian'an|1=Cheonan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3577288}}. * {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninna|1=Ninna}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|885|en|885|qid=Q24894|lt=885|1=885}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Gangyō|ja|元暦?|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gangyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninna|1=Ninna}}. * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Chishō|1=Jishō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – The first son of {{ill|Emperor Takakura|en|Emperor Takakura|qid=Q357261|lt=Emperor Takakura|1=Emperor Takakura}}, grandson of {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|en|Taira no Kiyomori|qid=Q281833|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|1=Taira no Kiyomori}}, ascended at age 3 and became Emperor Andoku, the 81st Emperor. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1188|en|1188|qid=Q19732|lt=1188|1=1188}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} issued an order to pursue {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} and others. * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}}. * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|qid=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|qid=Q7583|lt=1744|1=1744}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}}) – In accordance with the same edict, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} to {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|qid=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – The first daily newspaper in Tokyo, {{ill|Tokyo Nichi Nichi Shimbun|en|Tokyo Nichi Nichi Shimbun|qid=Q3530534|lt=Tokyo Nichinichi Shimbun|1=Tokyo Nichi Nichi Shimbun}} (currently {{ill|Mainichi Shimbun|en|Mainichi Shimbun|qid=Q1136866|lt=Mainichi Shimbun|1=Mainichi Shimbun}}), was founded. == Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|qid=Q6875|lt=1800|1=1800}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|qid=Q312351|lt=Emperor Ninkō|1=Emperor Ninkō}}, the 120th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Tetchō Suehiro|en|Tetchō Suehiro|qid=Q11519711|lt=Suehiro Tesshō|1=Tetchō Suehiro}}, a political commentator, newspaper reporter, and politician (died {{ill|1896|en|1896|qid=Q7846|lt=1896|1=1896}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|799|en|799|qid=Q33488|lt=799|1=799}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|qid=Q2461|lt=March 31|1=March 31}}) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|en|Wake no Kiyomaro|qid=Q7961005|lt=Wake Kiyosemaro|1=Wake no Kiyomaro}}, a courtier (born {{ill|733|en|733|qid=Q23570|lt=733|1=733}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|20|2|22|1|21|3|2|0221|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 21일]] [[ja:2月21日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿一]]
[[ar:February 21 (Lunisolar)]]
